typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchivedFullName as string (),
	ArchiveFilePath as string (),
	AuditPkgSK as integer (),
	AuditTableSK as integer (),
	CPFileSharePath as string (),
	EmailFrom as string (),
	EmailToOnCall as string (),
	EmailToRetailOps as string (),
	ErrCount as integer (),
	ESP_Event_Nm as string (),
	ESP_Job_Nm as string (),
	FileExist as boolean (),
	FileName as string (),
	FilePath as string (),
	InsCount as integer (),
	SrcCount as integer (),
	SSISLogFolderPath as string (),
	TotCount as integer (),
	UpdType1Count as integer (),
	UpdType2Count as integer ()
}

source(output(
		{Column 0} as string,
		{Column 1} as string,
		{Column 2} as string,
		{Operating Profit} as string,
		{Marketing } as string,
		{Depreciation Expense} as string,
		{Professional Fees} as string,
		{Legal } as string,
		{Licenses and Occupational Tax} as string,
		{Employee Activities} as string,
		{Other Insurance} as string,
		{Liability Insurance} as string,
		{Life Insurance} as string,
		{Non-Income Taxes} as string,
		{Training and Seminars} as string,
		{Subscriptions and Dues} as string,
		{Non-Capitalized Assets} as string,
		Restructuring as string,
		{Gain Loss on Disposal of Fixed Assets} as string,
		{Operating Allocations} as string,
		{Property - Net of Allocations} as string,
		{CPD Field Sales Operational Support Alloc} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> CONTROLLABLEPROFITPLANTextFile
CONTROLLABLEPROFITPLANTextFile derive({Column 0} = {Column 0}) ~> PlaceHolderRowCount1
PlaceHolderRowCount1 sink(input(
		PROFESSIONAL_FEES as integer,
		LIC_AND_OCCUP_TAX as integer,
		PROPERTY_NET_ALLOC as integer,
		MONTH as string,
		OPERATING_ALLOC as integer,
		NON_CAPITALIZED_ASSETS as integer,
		FISCAL_YR as string,
		OTHER_INSURANCE as integer,
		TRAINING_AND_SEMINARS as integer,
		LIFE_INSURANCE as integer,
		MARKETING as integer,
		EMPLOYEE_ACTIVITIES as integer,
		RESTRUCTURING as integer,
		DISPOSAL_OF_FIXED_ASSETS as integer,
		CPD_FIELD_SALES_OPS_SUPP_ALLOC as integer,
		LOC_ID as string,
		OPERATING_PROFIT as integer,
		LEGAL as integer,
		DEPRECIATION_EXPENSE as integer,
		LIABILITY_INSURANCE as integer,
		SUBSCRIPTIONS_AND_DUES as integer,
		NON_INCOME_TAXES as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		PROFESSIONAL_FEES = {Professional Fees},
		LIC_AND_OCCUP_TAX = {Licenses and Occupational Tax},
		PROPERTY_NET_ALLOC = {Property - Net of Allocations},
		MONTH = {Column 1},
		OPERATING_ALLOC = {Operating Allocations},
		NON_CAPITALIZED_ASSETS = {Non-Capitalized Assets},
		FISCAL_YR = {Column 0},
		OTHER_INSURANCE = {Other Insurance},
		TRAINING_AND_SEMINARS = {Training and Seminars},
		LIFE_INSURANCE = {Life Insurance},
		MARKETING = {Marketing },
		EMPLOYEE_ACTIVITIES = {Employee Activities},
		RESTRUCTURING = Restructuring,
		DISPOSAL_OF_FIXED_ASSETS = {Gain Loss on Disposal of Fixed Assets},
		CPD_FIELD_SALES_OPS_SUPP_ALLOC = {CPD Field Sales Operational Support Alloc},
		LOC_ID = {Column 2},
		OPERATING_PROFIT = {Operating Profit},
		LEGAL = {Legal },
		DEPRECIATION_EXPENSE = {Depreciation Expense},
		LIABILITY_INSURANCE = {Liability Insurance},
		SUBSCRIPTIONS_AND_DUES = {Subscriptions and Dues},
		NON_INCOME_TAXES = {Non-Income Taxes})) ~> FFCONTROLLABLEPROFITPLAN
